evidence_surface: DOJ SDNY press release local verified capture
paper_grade_value_now: Supports the narrow claim that the DOJ itself publicly said the SEC had filed a parallel civil action on 2025-04-09.
barrier_evidence: The verified local capture states: "Mr. Podolsky also thanked the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, which has filed a parallel civil action."
manuscript_interpretation_rule: Do not infer SEC complaint caption, docket number, filing date precision beyond the DOJ page, or merits posture from this line alone.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Capture an open SEC complaint or complaint-summary URL if a non-blocked public path surfaces; otherwise keep this as existence-only follow-up evidence.
visualization_hook: Posture-and-followup barrier card keyed by followup_target and barrier_type

evidence_surface: Local DOJ-linked indictment PDF quick extraction probe
paper_grade_value_now: Supports a reproducible explanation for why exact caption/case-number normalization was not promoted in this bounded cycle.
barrier_evidence: pdftotext output written to tmp/u.s._v._saniger_indictment.txt contained only nine form-feed bytes with no extractable text.
manuscript_interpretation_rule: Do not claim the indictment text layer was extracted or that exact caption/case metadata was verified from the PDF itself in this cycle.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Use OCR or image-to-text extraction on the captured PDF before promoting caption/case-number fields into shared ledgers.
visualization_hook: Document-depth barrier facet separating captured PDF presence from extractable text availability
